suggestions.message: Split long investigations into smaller bounded runs and checkpoint earlier.
Avoid broad file reads; prefer filtered `rg`, `tail`, or parser-first inspection.
Batch related reads and summarize once before issuing more inspection commands.
Standardize parser-first and filtered-read workflows before any broad JSONL or log inspection.
Use explicit token budgets per run and split exploratory analysis from implementation work.
Trim prompt scope and enforce filtered reads in automation tokens-performance.
Review skill-creator for wording that may broaden exploration unnecessarily.
